entries.title: National Skills Competition — Computer Software Design
entries.subtitle: 7th Place, Golden Hand Award
highlights: Wrote six hands-on programming problems in VB and solved all of them
Covered data structures, basic algorithms, UI layout, component usage, and data processing
Practiced 7–8 hours a day during preparation to sharpen logical analysis and implementation speed

entries.title: New Taipei Golden Hand Delegation — US Study Tour
entries.subtitle: Atlanta & San Francisco
highlights: Exchanged culture and professional skills with local student partners
Visited notable sites and analyzed the factors behind their success
Broadened international perspective on overseas education and technology adoption

entries.title: Skills Competition Coach at Alma Mater
entries.subtitle: Trained the following three cohorts of Computer Software Design competitors
highlights: Experimented with varied teaching methods: instructional videos, original practice problems, curriculum planning, and targeted remediation of weak points
Sharpened verbal explanation and problem-analysis skills through the coaching process

entries.title: Educational Big Data Micro-Program — 2025 Capstone Presentation Competition
entries.subtitle: "Long-Term Effects of Digital Learning Policy in Junior High Schools" (3-person team) — Honorable Mention
highlights: Investigated differences in learning outcomes before and after a junior-high digital learning policy rollout
Split data collection, analysis, and the final report across a 3-person team

entries.title: Sun Bird Software Co., Ltd. (Taiwan Branch)
entries.subtitle: Frontend Development Team — Intern
highlights: Developed and maintained frontend features in Angular, writing HTML, SCSS, and TypeScript
Participated in the full frontend development workflow, including code reviews and sprint reviews
Wrote technical and design documentation, and contributed to frontend architecture planning
Collaborated via Kanban, providing a weekly High Level Estimate to the PM
Gained fluency with agile development cadence and project-scale estimation

secondaryEntries.result: Golden Brain Award, Vocational High School General Track

secondaryEntries.title: PVQC English Vocabulary Proficiency International Certification
